title: Unnao Rape: Supreme Court restores Kuldeep Sengar's jail sentence
description: The Supreme Court on Friday set aside a Delhi High Court order that had suspended the jail sentence of former Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) legislator Kuldeep Singh Sengar in the 2017 Unnao rape case [Central Bureau of Investigation v. Kuldeep Singh Sengar]. A Bench of Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant and Justice Joymalya Bagchi also directed the Delhi High Court to promptly decide on Sengar's appeal against his conviction in the case, preferably within two months.
